reason: Successfully navigated to agent, sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?", waited for response, and verified it mentions "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing multiple agents including "QA-20260319-192020-uv1p"
Found and clicked on "QA-20260319-192020-uv1p" agent in sidebar - Successfully navigated to agent landing page showing "Start a conversation with QA-20260319-192020-uv1p"
Verified agent status - Agent status is "idle" (satisfies requirement for "running" or "idle")
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in message input field - Message successfully entered in input field labeled "Type your message..."
Clicked send button - Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session "Basic Math Question Session" created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Response received within 2 seconds, agent status returned to "idle"
Verified response mentions "4" - Screenshot shows agent response of "4." which correctly answers the math question
